detail.daysInStep: {days, plural, =0 {less than a day in this step} one {# day in this step} other {# days in this step}}

row.daysInStep: {days, plural, one {# day in this step} other {# days in this step}}

logFollowUp.title: Log follow-up
logFollowUp.hint: The follow-up is logged with today's date under Follow-ups and in the timeline. The wait time restarts from today.

finishDraft.title: Finish and send
finishDraft.body: When you send, the application moves to Submitted and the wait time counts from today.

toast.statusChangeBatch: {count, plural, one {# application marked} other {# applications marked}} as {to}
toast.followUpLogged: {company}: follow-up saved under Follow-ups, the wait time restarts

pipeline.emptyBody: Select another tab or create a new application.

queue.title: Needs action
queue.sortHint: Sorted by how urgent it is
queue.lede: The most important first. Click the card for all the details, or use the button to go straight to the action.

all.title: All applications
all.hint: Click a row or a card for all the details
all.noResults: No applications match the search or filter.

table.caption: Applications in table form, sortable
table.empty: No applications match the search or filter. Clear the search or change the filter to see all.

bulk.confirmTitle: Mark {count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}} as {status}?
bulk.confirmBody: {count, plural, one {One application will be closed} other {# applications will be closed}}. You can undo immediately afterwards, but not later without manual action.

board.toolbarCount: {count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}} · {active, plural, one {# active} other {# active}}
board.toolbarHint: Drag a card to another step. Click a card for details.
board.ghostHint: Drag a card back to Submitted to reactivate it.

rail.hint: Click a step to filter the list, click again to clear

reason.GhostSuggested: No reply for a long time.

followUps.emptyDrawer: No follow-ups yet. The button logs a follow-up here and resets the wait time in the action queue.

help.title: Follow-up or note?
help.p1: A follow-up means you acted, for example called or emailed the employer. It recalculates the wait time so the application can leave the action queue.
help.p2: If you only want to save a private reminder that does not affect the wait time, use Notes instead.
help.aria: What is this? The difference between a follow-up and a note

harAnsokt.appliedAriaLabel: You have marked this ad as applied

jobInfo.title: About the ad
jobInfo.viewAdAriaLabel: View the ad at {source} (opens in a new tab)
jobInfo.viewAdAriaLabelManual: View the ad (opens in a new tab)
jobInfo.noLongerActive: The ad is no longer active at {source}.

preservedAd.savedNotice: The ad is no longer active. This is a saved copy from {date}.
preservedAd.minimizedNotice: The full ad text was cleared because the application is concluded. The saved metadata is kept.
preservedAd.recruiterNoticeLink: Are you a contact person in the ad? Read how we process contact details.

help.title: Note or follow-up?
help.p1: A note is a private reminder for yourself. It does not affect the wait time or the action queue.
help.p2: If you have contacted the employer, log a follow-up instead, which recalculates the wait time.
help.aria: What is this? The difference between a note and a follow-up

recordOutcome.notice: The outcome cannot be changed once it has been saved. Check that it is correct before you save.
recordOutcome.confirmQuestion: Save the outcome {outcome}? This cannot be changed afterwards.

statusEdit.title: Status
statusEdit.closedNotice: This application is closed and cannot be changed.
statusEdit.singleNextStep: The next step for this application is {status}.
statusEdit.chooseInstruction: Select a new status. The current status is {status}.
statusEdit.destructiveNotice: {status} closes the application. This cannot be undone without manual action.
statusEdit.confirmBody: The application changes from {from} to {to}. This cannot be undone without manual action.

withdraw.confirmBody: The application changes from {from} to {to}. A withdrawn application is closed and cannot be changed further without manual action.

delete.confirmBody: The application and its entire history are permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

actions.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again.
actions.deleteFailed: The application could not be deleted.
